Class OneStepSimplifier

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.OneStepSimplifier
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
public final class OneStepSimplifier extends Object implements BuiltInRule

    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    OneStepSimplifier.Protocol
    Represents a list of rule applications performed in one OSS step.

  • Field Details

    • disableOSSRestriction

      public static boolean disableOSSRestriction
      If true, the OneStepSimplifier has access to the entire sequent during replay. If false, it is restricted to the formulas specified in the proof file.
      Only activate when loading old proof files (that do not contain this information)!

  • Constructor Details

    • OneStepSimplifier

      public OneStepSimplifier()

  • Method Details

    • shutdownIndices

      public void shutdownIndices()
      Deactivate one-step simplification: clear caches, restore taclets to the goals' taclet indices.

    • isShutdown

      public boolean isShutdown()
      returns true if the indices are shutdown

    • refreshOSS

      public static void refreshOSS(Proof proof)
      Enables or disables the one step simplification, depending on the strategy setting made. IMPORTANT: This won't do any good if called before the strategy has been set / changed for the current proof. So make sure that everything is done in proper order.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof for which to refresh the OneStepSimplifier instance.

    • isApplicable

      public boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence pio)
      Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
      Returning true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)
      Specified by:
      isApplicable in interface BuiltInRule

    • apply

      public @NonNull ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal, RuleApp ruleApp)
      Description copied from interface: RuleExecutor
      applies the given rule application to the specified goal
      Specified by:
      apply in interface BuiltInRule
      Specified by:
      apply in interface RuleExecutor<Goal>
      Parameters:
      goal - the goal that the rule application should refer to.
      ruleApp - the rule application that is executed.
      Returns:
      List of the goals created by the rule which have to be proved. If this is a close-goal-taclet ( this.closeGoal () ), the first goal of the return list is the goal that should be closed (with the constraint this taclet is applied under).

    • name

      public Name name()
      Description copied from interface: Named
      returns the name of this element
      Specified by:
      name in interface Named
      Returns:
      the name of the element
